metadata.description: Global deterministic JOILang generation rules and schema-faithful behavior.
Main JOILang generator block with deterministic JSON-only output and schema-grounded exemplars.
Final JOILang output scrubber that enforces JSON shape and strips explanation drift.

candidates:
{"name":"AnnounceFineDustLevel","cron":"","period":0,"code":"level = (#AirQualitySensor).airqualitysensor_finedustlevel
message = "The fine dust level is "
level_str = level
(#Speaker).speaker_speak(message + level_str)"}

{"name":"AnnounceOutdoorFineDustLevel","cron":"","period":0,"code":"pm25 = (#WeatherProvider).weatherprovider_pm25weather
message = "The outdoor fine dust level is "
message = message + pm25
(#Speaker).speaker_speak(message)"}

{"name":"NewYearArmRobotHello","cron":"","period":0,"code":"wait until ((#Clock).clock_year != 0)
wait until ((#Clock).clock_month == 1)
wait until ((#Clock).clock_day == 1)
wait until ((#Clock).clock_hour == 0)
wait until ((#Clock).clock_minute == 0)
wait until ((#Clock).clock_second == 0)
(#ArmRobot).armrobot_hello()"}

{"name":"SafeOrDoorLockUnlockAlertAt11PM","cron":"0 23 * * *","period":-1,"code":"if ((#Safe).safe_safestate != \"closed\" or (#DoorLock).doorlock_doorlockstate != \"closed\") {\n  (#Speaker).speaker_speak(\"Check the safe and door lock\")\n}"}
{"name":"BabyRoomNoiseAlert","cron":"","period":0,"code":"wait until ((#SoundSensor).soundsensor_sound > 40)\n(#Speaker).speaker_speak(\"Noise detected in the baby room\")"}

{"name":"Monday 8AM Safe and DoorLock Check","cron":"0 8 * * 1","period":-1,"code":"if ((#Safe).safe_safestate == \"closed\" and (#DoorLock).doorlock_doorlockstate == \"closed\") {\n  (#Speaker).speaker_speak(\"It is safe\")\n}"}

{"name":"SafeOrDoorUnlockAlertAt11PM","cron":"0 23 * * *","period":-1,"code":"if ((#Safe).safe_safestate == \"open\" or (#DoorLock).doorlock_doorlockstate == \"open\") {\n  (#Speaker).speaker_speak(\"Check the safe and door lock\")\n}"}
